title: melicytus ramiflorus subsp. samoensis
intro: Melicytus ramiflorus subsp. samoensis, also known as the Samoan forget-me-not tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Staphylocarpaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Melicytus ramiflorus subsp. samoensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
